_comment: WASM CALCULATOR EXAMPLE (roadmap C2). Consumes the perftest trade stream and computes notional = price * quantity INSIDE a sandboxed WebAssembly module (examples/wasm/calculators.wat, exported function 'notional'). The wasm VM cannot read host memory and can be CPU-capped with 'fuel'. The engine is unchanged - WasmCalculator is an ordinary custom calculator referenced by dotted path. Requires 'pip install wasmtime'; without it the node builds but calculate() raises a clear WasmRuntimeUnavailable. Feed it with: python -m perftest.run_wasm_example
name: perftest_wasm
description: trade stream (mem) -> WASM notional calculator (price*quantity in a wasmtime sandbox) -> mem sink. Demonstrates running a compiled, memory-isolated calculator over the same trade data as the other perftest examples.

config._note: Fed the canonical perftest trade stream (perftest.generate_trades.make_trade). Point at kafka://topic/perftest_trades for a broker-fed run.
Each trade with a wasm-computed 'notional' field added.
fuel caps CPU so a runaway module is stopped deterministically; the module sees only the two scalar inputs, never host memory.
